title: didissandra elongata subsp. minor
intro: Didissandra elongata subsp. minor, also known as the Himalayan didissandra, is a plant species belonging to the family Stemonuraceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and topical ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
